title: homognaphalium crispatulum
intro: Homognaphalium crispatulum, also known as the Desert Marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Homognaphalium crispatulum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
